hero.title: Brilliant Results,
hero.subtitle: Welcome to AquaClean – your modern car wash with eco-friendly technology, fair prices, and first-class vehicle care.

hours.title: Opening Hours
hours.subtitle: We're here for you almost every day – weekends included.
hours.holiday: Opening hours may vary on public holidays.

pricing.title: Our Wash Programs
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right program for your vehicle.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: A quick basic clean for everyday needs.

comfort.name: Comfort
comfort.description: Thorough care with a glossy finish.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Complete package for maximum protection and shine.

technology.title: State-of-the-Art Technology
technology.subtitle: We rely on innovative technology for optimal cleaning results – eco-friendly and efficient.

water.title: Water Recycling System
water.description: Up to 85% of wash water is treated and reused – good for the environment and your conscience.

brushes.title: Paint-Friendly Textile Brushes
brushes.description: Our modern textile wash systems clean effectively while protecting sensitive paint and surfaces.

nano.title: Nano Sealant
nano.description: Our premium sealant creates an invisible protective layer that repels water and dirt.

drying.title: Energy-Efficient Drying
drying.description: High-performance blowers with low energy consumption for streak-free drying in seconds.

location.title: Location & Directions
location.subtitle: Find us easily – right on the main road with plenty of parking.
location.directionsText: Directly on the B1, exit Musterstadt-Mitte. Free parking right in front of the facility.

imprint.title: Legal Notice

imprint.disclaimerText: The contents of our pages have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.
